# EhyaSoft

> EhyaSoft is a premium software development agency based in Lahore, Pakistan, building high-performance web applications, mobile apps, AI agents, UI/UX design, and enterprise software for startups and established businesses worldwide. We are the software development division of Ehya Education Services.

## About

- Company: EhyaSoft
- Parent: Ehya Education Services (https://ehya.com.pk/)
- Founded: 2019
- Location: 101 N, Block N, Model Town, Lahore, Punjab, Pakistan
- Email: soft@ehya.com.pk
- Website: https://soft.ehya.com.pk
- License: https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/
- Specialization: Pakistan, Lahore, edtech, AI agents, RAG, GraphRAG, web apps, mobile apps, enterprise software
- Team size: 10–25
- Hours: Mon–Fri 09:00–19:00 PKT (Sat & Sun closed)

## Services

- [Web Development](https://soft.ehya.com.pk/services/#web-development): Next.js, React, Node.js, scalable web platforms
- [Mobile App Development](https://soft.ehya.com.pk/services/#mobile-development): React Native, Flutter, native Swift/Kotlin
- [AI Agents & Automation](https://soft.ehya.com.pk/services/#ai-agents): LLM-powered agents, RAG & GraphRAG pipelines, workflow automation
- [Enterprise Software](https://soft.ehya.com.pk/services/#enterprise-software): Custom CRM/ERP, dashboards, internal tools, microservices
- [UI/UX Design](https://soft.ehya.com.pk/services/#ui-ux-design): Product design, design systems, user research

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://soft.ehya.com.pk/): Overview of EhyaSoft services and capabilities
- [About](https://soft.ehya.com.pk/about/): Team, story, values, leadership
- [Services](https://soft.ehya.com.pk/services/): Full breakdown of development services
- [Portfolio](https://soft.ehya.com.pk/portfolio/): Case studies and selected client work
- [Contact](https://soft.ehya.com.pk/contact/): Start a project, request a quote, directions to the Lahore office
- [Privacy Policy](https://soft.ehya.com.pk/privacy-policy/)
- [Terms of Service](https://soft.ehya.com.pk/terms-of-service/)

## Selected Work

- [AlifLaila Kids Digital Library](https://aliflaila.app/) — EdTech, flagship since 2023. React Native, Next.js, Node.js, Laravel, MySQL. Synced kids / parents / schools experiences.
- [Ehya Classmate](https://classmate.ehya.com.pk/) — EdTech, 2024. React Native, Next.js, Node.js, RAG. AI study companion for secondary-school students with SLO-based practice.
- [FIELDx AI — Smart Poultry Diagnosis & Farm Health Assistant](https://fieldxai.com/) — AgriTech veterinary diagnostics, 2024. React Native, Next.js, Node.js, MySQL, GraphRAG. AI-driven decision support for poultry vets, consultants, and farm managers: symptom analysis, treatment planning, and complete digital visit records in one mobile app.
- [Ittesaal — Journal of Connecting Discourses](https://journal.ehya.com.pk/ijcd) — Academic publishing, 2023. OJS, PHP, MySQL. Peer-reviewed open-access journal platform.

## Contact

For new projects, partnerships, or inquiries: soft@ehya.com.pk
